logical-reasoning.q: Dog is to puppy as cat is to ___?
logical-reasoning.e: A baby dog is a puppy, and a baby cat is a kitten.

logical-reasoning.q: Which one is different: Apple, Banana, Carrot, Orange?
logical-reasoning.e: Carrot is a vegetable. Apple, Banana, and Orange are fruits.

logical-reasoning.q: If A=1, B=2, C=3, what is the value of CAT?
Which letter comes exactly in the middle of the alphabet?
logical-reasoning.e: M is the 13th letter. There are 26 letters, so M is in the middle.

logical-reasoning.q: In a queue of 5 children, Riya is 2nd from the front. What is her position from the back?
logical-reasoning.e: In a queue of 5, 2nd from front means 4th from back.

logical-reasoning.q: Pen is to write as knife is to ___?
logical-reasoning.e: We use a pen to write and a knife to cut.

logical-reasoning.q: Which one is different: Square, Circle, Triangle, Rectangle?
logical-reasoning.e: Circle has no corners. Square, Triangle, and Rectangle have corners.

logical-reasoning.q: How many days are in a week?
logical-reasoning.e: There are 7 days in a week: Sunday to Saturday.

logical-reasoning.q: How many months are in a year?
logical-reasoning.e: There are 12 months in a year.

logical-reasoning.q: You have a red shirt and a blue shirt. You have black pants and white pants. How many different outfits can you make?
logical-reasoning.e: Red+Black, Red+White, Blue+Black, Blue+White = 4 outfits.

logical-reasoning.q: What comes next: 2, 4, 6, 8, ___?
logical-reasoning.e: The pattern adds 2 each time. 8 + 2 = 10.

logical-reasoning.q: Which one is different: Dog, Cat, Cow, Lion?
logical-reasoning.e: Lion is a wild animal. Dog, Cat, and Cow are domestic animals.

logical-reasoning.q: If A=1, B=2, C=3, what is the value of BAD?
Which letter comes after G in the alphabet?
logical-reasoning.e: The alphabet order is ... F, G, H, I, J ...

logical-reasoning.q: In a line of 7 children, Sita is 3rd from the front. What is her position from the back?
logical-reasoning.e: In a line of 7, 3rd from front = 5th from back.

logical-reasoning.q: Bird is to fly as fish is to ___?
logical-reasoning.e: Birds fly and fish swim.

logical-reasoning.q: What comes next: 5, 10, 15, 20, ___?
logical-reasoning.e: The pattern adds 5 each time. 20 + 5 = 25.

logical-reasoning.q: How many days are in February in a leap year?
logical-reasoning.e: February has 29 days in a leap year.

logical-reasoning.q: A triangle has how many sides?
logical-reasoning.e: A triangle has 3 sides.

logical-reasoning.q: You can choose juice or milk. You can choose bread or rice. How many different meals can you make?
logical-reasoning.e: Juice+Bread, Juice+Rice, Milk+Bread, Milk+Rice = 4 meals.

logical-reasoning.q: Book is to read as song is to ___?
logical-reasoning.e: We read books and sing songs.

logical-reasoning.q: What comes next: 1, 3, 5, 7, ___?
logical-reasoning.e: The pattern adds 2 each time. 7 + 2 = 9.

logical-reasoning.q: A square has how many corners (vertices)?
logical-reasoning.e: A square has 4 corners.

logical-reasoning.q: Which letter comes before D in the alphabet?
logical-reasoning.e: The alphabet order is ... A, B, C, D, E ...

logical-reasoning.q: Which one is different: Red, Blue, Green, Apple?
logical-reasoning.e: Apple is a fruit. Red, Blue, and Green are colours.

numbers.q: What is the place value of 5 in 456?
numbers.e: In 456, 5 is in the tens place, so its value is 50.
243 is greater because 4 tens is more than 3 tens.

numbers.q: In 678, which digit is in the ones place?
numbers.e: 8 is in the ones place in 678.

numbers.q: What do we get when we add 0 to any number?
numbers.e: Adding 0 to any number gives the same number.

numbers.q: What is the expanded form of 345?
Ravi has 45 marbles. He gets 28 more. How many does he have now?

addition-and-subtraction.q: If 1 pizza is cut into 8 equal slices, how many slices make half?

addition-and-subtraction.e: Half plus half equals one whole.

addition-and-subtraction.q: There are 32 apples in 4 baskets. How many in each basket?
How many minutes are in 1 hour?
What is the standard unit of length?
addition-and-subtraction.e: Metre is the standard unit for measuring length.

addition-and-subtraction.q: How many hours are in 1 day?
If a pencil costs ₹5, how much do 3 pencils cost?
How many centimetres are in 1 metre?
How many days are in 1 week?
Riya has ₹20. She buys a toy for ₹12. How much is left?
What do we use to measure weight?
addition-and-subtraction.e: A scale or balance measures weight.

addition-and-subtraction.q: How many months are in 1 year?
Which coin is worth the most?
addition-and-subtraction.e: ₹5 is worth the most among these.

addition-and-subtraction.q: If it is 3:00 now, what time will it be in 2 hours?
Which is longer: 1 metre or 100 centimetres?
addition-and-subtraction.e: 1 m = 100 cm. They are the same length.

patterns.q: How many corners does a square have?

patterns.e: A circle has no corners. It is round.

patterns.q: In a bar chart, what do the bars show?
patterns.e: Bars in a bar chart show numbers or amounts.

patterns.q: How many sides does a rectangle have?

patterns.e: 5 + 3 = 8. Order does not matter in addition.
A ball is round like a sphere.

patterns.q: How many days are in 2 weeks?
Which shape has all sides equal?
patterns.e: A square has all 4 sides equal.

patterns.q: If 4 children share 12 apples equally, how many does each get?
How many faces does a cube have?

patterns.e: A cylinder can roll because it is round.

patterns.q: How many corners does a triangle have?
What comes next: A, C, E, G, __?
patterns.e: Skip one letter. After G comes I.

patterns.q: How many sides does a pentagon have?

shapes.q: What shape is a dice?
Which shape has all sides equal and 4 corners?
shapes.e: A square has all 4 sides equal and 4 corners.

shapes.q: What is the place value of 3 in 234?
shapes.e: In 234, 3 is in the tens place, so its value is 30.

shapes.q: Which number is smaller: 412 or 421?
shapes.e: 412 is smaller because 1 ten is less than 2 tens.

shapes.q: What is 6 × 4?
What is 28 ÷ 4?
How many quarters make one whole?
What is 48 ÷ 6?
What is 7 × 7?
What is 63 ÷ 7?
What is 5 × 9?
What is 36 ÷ 4?
What does 3/4 mean?
What is 9 × 6?
How many 50 paise coins make ₹2?
What unit do we use to measure weight?
shapes.e: Kilogram is used to measure weight.

shapes.q: A book costs ₹35. How much do 2 books cost?
How many metres are in 300 centimetres?
What do we use to measure liquids?
shapes.e: We use litres to measure liquids.

shapes.q: Vikram had ₹50. He spent ₹23. How much is left?
If it is 10:00 now, what time will it be in 3 hours?
What is 5 metres in centimetres?
How much is ₹20 + ₹15 + ₹5?
What unit do we use to measure length?
shapes.e: Metre is used to measure length.

shapes.q: How many minutes are in 3 hours?
In a pictograph, what do pictures represent?
shapes.e: Pictures in a pictograph represent numbers or amounts.

shapes.q: If 5 children share 20 toffees equally, how many does each get?
How many sides does a hexagon have?
Which shape has 5 sides?
How many edges does a cube have?

fractions.e: 1/2 means one out of two equal parts, or half.
1/4 means one out of four equal parts, which is also called one quarter.

fractions.q: If a pizza is cut into 4 equal slices and you eat 1 slice, what fraction did you eat?
fractions.e: One slice out of 4 equal slices is 1/4.

fractions.q: Between 1/2 and 1/4, which fraction is larger?
fractions.e: 1/2 (half) is greater than 1/4 (quarter) because half of something is more than a quarter.

fractions.q: If you shade 2 out of 4 equal parts of a shape, what fraction is shaded?
fractions.e: 2 out of 4 equal parts is 2/4, which is the same as 1/2.
Half of 10 is 5.
One quarter of 8 is 2.
3/4 means three out of four equal parts, or three quarters.

fractions.q: Riya ate 1/2 of a chocolate bar. Her brother ate 1/4. Who ate more?
fractions.e: 1/2 is greater than 1/4, so Riya ate more.

fractions.q: In the fraction 3/4, what does the 4 represent?
fractions.e: In a fraction, the bottom number (denominator) shows the total number of equal parts.

fractions.q: In the fraction 2/5, what does the 2 represent?
fractions.e: The top number (numerator) shows how many parts are taken.
Half of 16 is 8.

fractions.q: A ribbon is cut into 5 equal pieces. You take 2 pieces. What fraction of the ribbon do you have?
fractions.e: 2 out of 5 equal pieces is 2/5.
1/2 (half) is greater than 1/3 (one third).

fractions.q: If 3 out of 6 equal parts are shaded, what fraction is shaded?
fractions.e: 3 out of 6 equal parts is 3/6, which equals 1/2.
One quarter of 20 is 5.

fractions.q: Which fraction is the same as 2/4?
fractions.e: 2/4 = 1/2. Both represent half.

fractions.q: A cake is divided into 8 equal slices. You eat 3 slices. What fraction of the cake is left?
fractions.e: 8 - 3 = 5 slices left. 5 out of 8 is 5/8.
2/3 means two parts out of three, which is more than 1/3.
4/4 means all 4 parts, which is the whole.
One quarter of 12 is 3. Three quarters is 3 × 3 = 9.
1/3 means one out of three equal parts.

fractions.q: A book has 24 pages. You read 1/3 of it. How many pages did you read?
If a shape is divided into 6 equal parts and 3 are shaded, what fraction is shaded?
fractions.e: 3 out of 6 equal parts is 3/6, which equals 1/2.
1/4 (quarter) is smaller than 1/2 (half).

measurement.q: Which unit do we use to measure the length of a pencil?
measurement.e: We use centimetres (cm) to measure short lengths like a pencil.

measurement.q: One metre is equal to how many centimetres?
Which unit do we use to measure the weight of a bag of rice?
measurement.e: We use kilograms (kg) to measure weight of heavy things like rice.

measurement.q: How many grams are in 1 kilogram?
Which unit do we use to measure the amount of water in a bottle?
measurement.e: We use litres (L) to measure liquids like water.

measurement.q: How many millilitres are in 1 litre?
What do we use to measure how hot or cold something is?
measurement.e: A thermometer measures temperature in degrees Celsius.

measurement.q: One hour has how many minutes?
If school starts at 8:00 and ends at 12:00, how many hours is the school day?
A table is 150 cm long. How many metres is that?
Which unit do we use to measure the length of a room?
measurement.e: We use metres (m) to measure longer lengths like rooms.

measurement.q: Which unit do we use to measure the weight of an apple?
measurement.e: We use grams (g) for lighter items like an apple.

measurement.q: A jug holds 2 litres of water. How many millilitres is that?
A rope is 3 metres long. How many centimetres is that?
Which unit do we use to measure the amount of milk in a glass?
measurement.e: We use millilitres (ml) for small amounts of liquid.

measurement.q: One minute has how many seconds?
If a bag weighs 2 kg, how many grams is that?
If a movie starts at 2:00 and ends at 4:30, how long is the movie?
measurement.e: From 2:00 to 4:30 is 2 hours and 30 minutes.

measurement.q: Are 1 metre and 100 centimetres the same length?
What unit do we use to measure temperature?
measurement.e: Temperature is measured in degrees Celsius (°C).

measurement.q: A desk is 80 cm wide. How many metres is that?
Which tool do we use to measure length?
measurement.e: A ruler is used to measure length in centimetres.

measurement.q: Which tool do we use to measure weight?
measurement.e: A weighing scale measures weight in kilograms or grams.

measurement.q: How many hours are in one day?

money.q: One rupee equals how many paise?
Ravi has 2 coins of ₹5 each. How much money does he have?
A pencil costs ₹12. How much do 2 pencils cost?
Priya has ₹50. She buys a book for ₹35. How much money is left with her?
Which is the smallest Indian currency note?
money.e: ₹10 is the smallest Indian currency note in common use.

money.q: An eraser costs ₹8 and a sharpener costs ₹5. How much do both cost together?
50 paise + 50 paise = ?
A toy costs ₹45. Rohan has ₹30. How much more money does he need?
Which symbol do we use for rupees?
money.e: ₹ is the symbol for Indian Rupee.

money.q: Three friends share ₹60 equally. How much does each get?
How many 50 paise coins make 1 rupee?
A notebook costs ₹25 and a pen costs ₹15. How much do both cost together?
If you have 1 note of ₹10 and 2 coins of ₹5, how much do you have?
A toy costs ₹80. You pay with ₹100. How much change do you get back?
25 paise + 25 paise + 25 paise + 25 paise = ?
Four ice creams cost ₹48. How much does one ice cream cost?
Which is more: ₹50 or 500 paise?
Maya has ₹100. She buys a book for ₹65. How much money does she have left?
How many 50 paise coins make ₹5?
A shirt costs ₹120 and a cap costs ₹40. How much more does the shirt cost?
3 pencils cost ₹18. How much does 1 pencil cost?
Amit has ₹75. He needs ₹95 to buy a game. How much more does he need?
Five friends share ₹100 equally. How much does each get?
A chocolate costs ₹15. How much do 2 chocolates cost?

data-handling.q: A pictograph uses ___ to show data.
data-handling.e: A pictograph uses pictures or symbols to represent data.

data-handling.q: In a survey, 5 children like apples, 8 like bananas, and 3 like oranges. Which fruit is most liked?
data-handling.e: 8 children like bananas, which is more than apples (5) and oranges (3).

data-handling.q: How many children are there in total if 4 like red, 6 like blue, and 5 like green?
data-handling.e: 4 + 6 + 5 = 15 children in total.

data-handling.q: In a class, 12 students have dogs, 8 have cats, and 5 have both. How many students have at least one pet?
data-handling.e: 12 + 8 - 5 = 15 (we subtract 5 because they were counted twice).

data-handling.q: What do we call a table that shows data in rows and columns?
data-handling.e: A data table organizes information in rows and columns.

data-handling.q: The heights of 4 friends are: 120 cm, 125 cm, 118 cm, 130 cm. What is the tallest height?
data-handling.e: 130 cm is the greatest number, so it is the tallest.

data-handling.q: If each 🍎 represents 2 apples, how many apples does 🍎🍎🍎 represent?
data-handling.e: 3 symbols × 2 apples each = 6 apples.

data-handling.q: To find the most common item in data, we look for the ___ value.
data-handling.e: The largest value or highest count shows the most common item.

data-handling.q: Scores in a test: 8, 9, 7, 9, 10. What is the total of all scores?
What do we call collecting information by asking questions?
data-handling.e: A survey is a way to collect data by asking questions.

data-handling.q: In a class, 6 children like cricket, 4 like football, and 7 like badminton. Which sport is least liked?
data-handling.e: 4 children like football, which is fewer than cricket (6) and badminton (7).

data-handling.q: If each ⭐ represents 3 stars, how many stars does ⭐⭐⭐⭐ represent?
data-handling.e: 4 symbols × 3 stars each = 12 stars.

data-handling.q: A tally of |||| means how many?
data-handling.e: Each vertical line in a tally represents 1. |||| = 4.

data-handling.q: Ages of 5 children: 7, 8, 7, 9, 7. What is the most common age?
data-handling.e: 7 appears 3 times, which is more than 8 or 9.

data-handling.q: In a pictograph, if 🍊 = 2 oranges, then 🍊🍊🍊 = ?
data-handling.e: 3 symbols × 2 oranges each = 6 oranges.

data-handling.q: Marks of 4 students: 85, 90, 78, 92. What is the highest mark?
data-handling.e: 92 is the greatest number.

data-handling.q: To find the total, we ___ all the numbers.
data-handling.e: To find the total, we add all the numbers together.

data-handling.q: Fruits sold: 10 apples, 15 bananas, 12 oranges. How many fruits were sold in total?
What do we call a chart that uses bars to show data?
data-handling.e: A bar graph uses bars to show and compare data.

data-handling.q: Temperatures for 4 days: 28°C, 32°C, 25°C, 30°C. What is the lowest temperature?
data-handling.e: 25°C is the smallest number.

data-handling.q: A tally of |||| |||| means how many?
Books read: Riya 5, Amit 7, Sita 6, Rohan 9. Who read the most?
data-handling.e: Rohan read 9 books, which is the highest.

data-handling.q: To compare data, we look at the ___ of the bars in a bar graph.
data-handling.e: The height of bars shows the value and helps us compare.

data-handling.q: Scores: 7, 9, 8, 9, 7. What is the total score?
What do we call the list that shows what each symbol means in a pictograph?
data-handling.e: The key tells us what each symbol represents.

algebra.q: If 50% of a number is 25, what is the number?

advanced-math.q: How many sides does a hexagon have?
How many faces does a cube have?
If log₁₀(100) = n, what is n?
How many vertices does a triangular prism have?
How many edges does a cube have?
How many diagonals does a square have?

trigonometry.q: In a right triangle, what is the side opposite the right angle called?
trigonometry.e: The hypotenuse is opposite the right angle.

trigonometry.q: What is the value of sin(30°)?

trigonometry.e: tan θ = sin θ / cos θ.

trigonometry.q: What is the range of sin θ?
trigonometry.e: sin θ is always between -1 and 1.

trigonometry.q: In a right triangle with angle 30°, the side opposite 30° is half of the ___?
In a 30-60-90 triangle, the ratio of sides is?
What is the period of sin θ?
In a right triangle, if one angle is 45°, the other acute angle is?
What is the height of a pole if its shadow is 10 m and angle of elevation is 45°?
If sin θ = 3/5, what is cos θ? (Assume right triangle)
